Clone the models/research/delf repository from GitHub using git clone https://github.com/mirzaim/models.git
Create a Python script named reproduce_bug.py
Import TensorFlow and other necessary modules at the beginning of reproduce_bug.py
Define constants for batch size, image size, and number of classes (e.g., batch_size=2, image_size=321, num_classes=1000)
Generate random uniform input data with shape (batch_size, height, width, 3) using tf.random.uniform function
Create an instance of the Delg class from delf.python.training.model module, passing block3_strides=True and use_dim_reduction=True as parameters
Call the init_classifiers method on the Delg instance, passing num_classes as a parameter
Assert that the Delg instance has the correct attributes such as backbone, desc_classifier, attn_classifier, etc.
Attempt to call the forward_pass method on the Delg instance with the generated input data and verify that it raises ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'delf.python.datasets'
Monitor GPU memory usage during execution of reproduce_bug.py
Assert that GPU memory usage does not exceed expected threshold
